tasks.spec: You are a fix worker in a repair swarm for {{PROJECT}}. Your current working directory IS a dedicated git worktree of the repo — edit files IN PLACE. HARD RULES: (1) Do NOT run git commit, git branch, git push, or touch .git — verification exports your uncommitted diff. (2) You own ONLY these files; do not touch anything else: {{OWNED_FILES — every file this task may modify; must be disjoint from every other task in this run AND any concurrent run on the same repo}}. THE FIX: {{FINDING — what is wrong, where (file:line), the evidence, and what correct looks like}}. VERIFY YOUR OWN WORK before finishing: {{LOCAL_VERIFY — e.g. npm run build, npx tsc --noEmit, python -m py_compile <file>}}.
tasks.check: {{BUILD_OR_TEST_COMMAND — must print errors on failure, e.g. 'npm run build 2>&1 | tail -40'}} && git add -A && git diff --cached > '{{WORKDIR}}/{{FIX_KEY}}.patch' && test -s '{{WORKDIR}}/{{FIX_KEY}}.patch' || { echo 'FAIL: build/test failed or patch is empty — worker made no verifiable change'; exit 1; }
tasks.verified: the build/tests passed after the change and the exported patch is non-empty
